text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 
National Death Index (NDI) segment files. Each entry has variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the 
variables. 
 BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 

LABEL: Reference Year
